query:
SELECT vt.id, vt.name, vt.description, vt.severity, vt.legal_basis, vt.created_at,
  COUNT(dvt.document_id) as doc_count
FROM violation_tags vt
LEFT JOIN document_violation_tags dvt ON vt.id = dvt.violation_tag_id
GROUP BY vt.id, vt.name, vt.description, vt.severity, vt.legal_basis, vt.created_at
ORDER BY vt.severity DESC, vt.name;
